data.title: Wearable Devices Wins U.S. Patent Nod for Biometric Authentication in Gesture Interface
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Wearable Devices Ltd. ( (WLDS) ).

Wearable Devices Ltd., an Israel-based developer of AI-driven touchless neural input wearables such as the Mudra Band and Mudra Link, focuses on gesture-based control for consumer and enterprise applications. The Nasdaq-listed company targets gaming, productivity, XR, and smart environments through a dual model of direct sales and enterprise collaborations, positioning itself as a key player in the emerging neural input and XR interface ecosystem.

On April 24, 2026, Wearable Devices announced it had received a U.S. Patent and Trademark Office Notice of Allowance for a continuation patent covering biometric user authentication in its gesture and voice-controlled interface device. The new patent strengthens the firm’s intellectual property around combining gesture sensors with biopotential neural sensors to verify users via unique biological signals, supporting secure payments, access control, and sensitive actions while reinforcing the Mudra platform’s competitive position and raising barriers to entry in the human-computer interaction market.

Spark’s Take on WLDS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WLDS is a Neutral.

The score is weighed down primarily by severe ongoing losses and persistent cash burn despite strong revenue growth and low leverage. Technicals also remain broadly bearish with the stock trading well below major moving averages, while valuation offers limited support due to negative earnings and no stated dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on WLDS stock, click here.

More about Wearable Devices Ltd.

Wearable Devices Ltd. is an Israel-based technology growth company specializing in AI-powered touchless sensing wearables and neural input interfaces. Its flagship consumer products, the Mudra Band and Mudra Link, enable gesture-based, hands-free control of digital devices and XR environments, sold via direct-to-consumer channels and enterprise licensing partnerships in gaming, productivity, and immersive smart environments.

The company leverages proprietary sensors, software, and advanced AI algorithms to interpret neural and gesture signals, targeting both wrist-worn devices and broader brain-computer interface applications. Listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbols WLDS and WLDSW, Wearable Devices positions itself as a standard-setter for neural input within the fast-growing XR and human-computer interaction markets, offering solutions for consumers and enterprise clients alike.

Average Trading Volume: 2,477,721

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $3.53M

For a thorough assessment of WLDS stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Ondas Completes Mistral Merger, Expanding Defense Prime Reach
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

Forget margin or options. Here's how the pros trade ONDS

Ondas ( (ONDS) ) has provided an update.

On April 24, 2026, Ondas Inc. completed its $175 million merger with Mistral Inc., a U.S.-based defense prime contractor, folding Mistral into Ondas as a wholly owned subsidiary and issuing a mix of immediate and deferred common stock consideration, including escrowed shares for adjustments and indemnities. The company also put in place registration rights that allow resale of issued shares while capping Mistral’s shareholder daily sales to 10% of average trading volume, and granted inducement RSUs tied to the deal to 58 new employees.

The transaction gives Ondas direct prime contractor access to U.S. Army and Special Operations contract vehicles, expands its U.S. manufacturing and integration footprint, and strengthens its positioning as a next-generation defense prime for autonomous systems across U.S. defense and homeland security markets. Mistral adds programs exceeding $1 billion in value and $264 million of contracted backlog, lifting Ondas’ pro forma backlog, including the recent World View acquisition, to about $457 million as of March 31, 2026, which is expected to meaningfully enhance growth prospects and scale its U.S. operations.

The most recent analyst rating on (ONDS) stock is a Buy with a $19.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ondas stock, see the ONDS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ONDS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ONDS is a Neutral.

ONDS scores as moderately attractive mainly due to the earnings-call-driven outlook (raised 2026 revenue guidance, strong margin improvement narrative, and substantial liquidity to fund growth). This is tempered by weak underlying financial performance (large losses and ongoing cash burn) and a soft technical setup (below key moving averages with negative MACD), while valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no indicated dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on ONDS stock, click here.

More about Ondas

Ondas Inc., listed on Nasdaq as ONDS, is a provider of autonomous systems, robotics and mission-critical wireless connectivity aimed at defense, security and industrial markets. Through units including Ondas Autonomous Systems, Ondas Capital and Ondas Networks, it offers AI-enabled aerial and ground robotic platforms, counter-UAS technologies and IEEE 802.16t-based private wireless solutions for complex operational environments.

Its technologies combine autonomous platforms, advanced sensing and resilient communications to support defense, homeland security and critical infrastructure missions worldwide. Customers include defense forces, government agencies and industrial operators seeking persistent intelligence, surveillance, security and operational response capabilities across demanding use cases.

Average Trading Volume: 80,986,328

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $5.08B

Learn more about ONDS stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Zapata Computing Raises $15 Million to Expand Quantum Platform
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Zapata Computing Holdings ( (ZPTA) ) is now available.

On April 23, 2026, Zapata Quantum announced it had completed an oversubscribed $15 million strategic financing led by venture firm Triatomic Capital, with participation from other investors, marking the final milestone in a year-long restructuring. The funding, seen by management as a vote of confidence from long-term backers, will be used to scale the company’s hardware-agnostic quantum software platform and expand its science, engineering, product and commercial teams as it seeks to close the gap between rapid hardware progress and validated enterprise applications.

The company highlighted its growing role in the application layer of quantum computing, pointing to work with Fortune 500 clients, government agencies and a 2025 Nature Biotechnology cover study on quantum-enabled drug discovery targeting the KRAS mutation as evidence of its capabilities. By leveraging AI-native development practices and academic collaborations such as its partnership with the University of Maryland on formal algorithm validation, Zapata aims to strengthen its position in the emerging market for quantum utility and advance its status as a foundational platform provider for high-value quantum use cases.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ZPTA is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (zero revenue in 2025, persistent losses, negative equity, and ongoing cash burn) and highly unfavorable valuation (extremely high P/E). To see Spark’s full report on ZPTA stock, click here.

More about Zapata Computing Holdings

Zapata Quantum, based in Boston and trading over the counter as ZPTA, is a hardware-agnostic, pure-play quantum software company focused on accelerating quantum application development for enterprises and government. Spun out of Harvard’s Quantum Computing Lab in 2017, it holds more than 60 granted and pending patents and works across domains including cryptography, pharmaceuticals, finance, materials discovery and defense, helping Fortune 500 clients and public-sector agencies turn quantum advances into practical solutions.

Sierra Bancorp ( (BSRR) ) has shared an update.

On April 23, 2026, Sierra Bancorp’s board declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.26 per share, following its review of financial performance and capital for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The dividend will be paid on May 11, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 4, 2026, continuing a cash dividend streak that began in 1987 and marking the company’s 109th consecutive quarterly dividend, underscoring its long-term commitment to shareholder returns and capital strength.

The sustained dividend history, including annual payouts through 1998 and quarterly dividends thereafter, highlights Sierra Bancorp’s consistent profitability and conservative balance sheet management. data.title: Telomir Pharmaceuticals Completes TELI Acquisition, Expands Telomir-1 Rights
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc. ( (TELO) ) has issued an update.

On April 22, 2026, Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc. completed its previously approved acquisition of TELI Pharmaceuticals, Inc., issuing 34,389,710 restricted common shares to former TELI shareholders based on independently derived valuations. The deal, endorsed by Telomir shareholders on March 23, 2026, was structured under securities law exemptions and included a $1 million contribution at closing from TELI shareholder Bayshore Trust.

Bayshore Trust also agreed to an additional option to invest up to $4 million tied to future milestones, including FDA acceptance of an Investigational New Drug application for Telomir-1 and the start of a Phase 1/2 clinical trial. The acquisition consolidates all global rights to Telomir-1 under Telomir Pharmaceuticals, eliminating prior geographic fragmentation and giving the company unified control over development and potential commercialization in key international markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (TELO) stock is a Buy with a $8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc. stock, see the TELO Stock Forecast page.

More about Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc.

Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on the development of Telomir-1 (also known as Telomir-Zn), a therapeutic platform with rights spanning major international markets. The company operates in the pharmaceutical and life sciences sector, concentrating on advancing Telomir-1 through regulatory milestones and clinical development toward potential commercialization.

Average Trading Volume: 103,665

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Tompkins Financial Corporation ( (TMP) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Tompkins Financial Corporation reported record first-quarter 2026 results on April 24, 2026, with diluted earnings per share rising 32.8% year over year to $1.82 and net income climbing 32.5% to $26.1 million, driven by higher net interest income, improved net interest margin and solid loan and deposit growth. Performance was supported by a 3.57% net interest margin, lower funding costs, strong capital ratios and generally stable credit quality, while the sale of Tompkins Insurance Agencies in late 2025 reduced noninterest income but also cut expenses, and the board declared a dividend of $0.67 per share on April 23, 2026, payable May 15 to shareholders of record on May 8.

Net interest margin expansion reflected reinvestment of securities at higher yields, growth in commercial real estate and commercial and industrial loans, and lower average costs for deposits and other interest-bearing liabilities. Asset quality indicators remained solid, with modest net charge-offs, lower nonperforming asset levels than a year earlier and allowance coverage above 100% of nonperforming loans, while capital ratios stayed well above regulatory well-capitalized thresholds, underscoring balance-sheet strength despite the loss of insurance-related fee income.

The most recent analyst rating on (TMP) stock is a Buy with a $87.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tompkins Financial Corporation stock, see the TMP Stock Forecast page.

data.title: AXIA Energia Shareholders Back Corporate Name Change at April EGM
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from AXIA Energia Pfd Class B ( ($AXIA.PR) ).

AXIA Energia S.A., based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, operates in the energy sector, although the filing does not detail its specific business lines. The company is a foreign private issuer reporting on Form 20‑F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, reflecting an international investor base and access to cross‑border capital markets.

On April 15, 2026, AXIA Energia S.A. held an extraordinary general meeting at which shareholders approved changing the company’s corporate name to AXIA Energia S.A. and amending its bylaws accordingly. The detailed voting map for the April 2026 filing shows near‑unanimous support for the proposal, underscoring broad shareholder backing for the rebranding and the clearer corporate identity it provides in domestic and international markets.

Spark’s Take on AXIA.PR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AXIA.PR is a Outperform.

The overall stock score of 74 reflects a strong strategic position with significant achievements in asset divestment and dividend payouts, as highlighted in the earnings call. Technical indicators show bullish momentum, though valuation concerns persist due to negative profitability. Financial performance is stable but faces challenges with profitability and revenue growth.

To see Spark’s full report on AXIA.PR stock, click here.

More about AXIA Energia Pfd Class B

AXIA Energia S.A., based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, operates in the energy sector, although the filing does not detail its specific business lines. The company is a foreign private issuer listed in the United States and reports to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission under Form 20-F, indicating an international shareholder base and access to global capital markets.

The firm’s structure as an energy-focused Brazilian corporation positions it within Latin America’s broader power and resources industry, where branding and regulatory identity are key to investor recognition. Its preferred shares, including Class B, are widely held, as suggested by the extensive shareholder voting map disclosed in the filing.

On April 15, 2026, AXIA Energia S.A. held an extraordinary general meeting at which shareholders voted on changing the company’s corporate name to AXIA Energia S.A. and amending its bylaws accordingly. The detailed voting map filed for April 2026 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission shows overwhelming support for the name change, with virtually all recorded votes cast in favor and negligible opposition or abstentions.

The approval of the new corporate name and corresponding bylaw amendments formalizes a rebranding of the Brazilian energy company and clarifies its identity for investors. An update from Meiragtx Holdings ( (MGTX) ) is now available.

On April 20, 2026, MeiraGTx Holdings and affiliates completed the initial closing of a strategic collaboration with Guernsey-based Hologen Limited to jointly research, develop, manufacture and commercialize MeiraGTx’s AAV-GAD and AAV-BDNF gene therapy programs and its proprietary delivery device. The parties amended prior neuro and manufacturing framework agreements and entered a new collaboration and license pact, aligning ownership structures and funding mechanisms for these clinical programs and the device.

Ahead of closing, MeiraGTx Neuro UK and Hologen funded and structured shareholdings in Hologen Neuro AI Limited using a portion of a previously committed $200 million upfront payment, with Hologen ultimately set to own 70% and MeiraGTx 30% of HNAI after completion. In parallel, Hologen acquired and agreed to purchase additional minority stakes in MeiraGTx Manufacturing, with options that could raise Hologen’s ownership to up to 40% and a mirrored option later allowing MeiraGTx to buy back Hologen’s stake, shaping long-term control of key manufacturing assets.

Optimumbank Holdings ( (OPHC) ) has issued an update.

OptimumBank Holdings reported unaudited first-quarter 2026 net income of $4.7 million, or $0.39 per basic share, up from $3.9 million a year earlier but slightly below the 2025 fourth quarter, driven by a $3.8 million rise in net interest income and higher noninterest income, partly offset by increased expenses and credit loss provisions. For the quarter ended March 31, 2026, the bank posted robust balance sheet growth, with gross loans up 13.8% to $1.09 billion, deposits up 17.3% to $1.09 billion, total assets at $1.27 billion, strong capital ratios, and top-tier profitability metrics that helped earn a No. 49 national community bank ranking from S&P Global and new equity research coverage, reinforcing its positioning as one of South Florida’s fastest-growing community banks.

Loan growth in the quarter was led by commercial real estate, alongside gains in consumer and construction lending, while credit quality remained solid with minimal net charge-offs and an allowance for credit losses equal to 1.01% of total loans. Management highlighted improved net interest margin, disciplined funding costs, and continued investment in technology and talent, and noted that the firm has begun executing on expansion into new financial verticals, including closing its first OptimumFinance loan in April 2026, signaling a diversification beyond traditional banking.

Immersion ( (IMMR) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 23, 2026, Immersion Corporation said a Nasdaq Hearings Panel granted its request to maintain its listing on the Nasdaq Stock Market, provided the company regains compliance with Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) by May 22, 2026. The ruling followed a March 26, 2026 hearing and earlier notices that Immersion had failed to timely file its Form 10-Q for the quarter ended January 31, 2026, and the company is working to complete the filing and restore full compliance with SEC and Nasdaq requirements.

The decision temporarily removes the immediate threat of delisting but puts pressure on Immersion to resolve its reporting delays within a tight deadline, a factor that could weigh on investor sentiment if not met. Successful and timely filing would stabilize its market status, while any further lapse could renew the risk of losing its Nasdaq listing and potentially disrupt trading liquidity for shareholders.

The latest update is out from Itron ( (ITRI) ).

On April 13, 2026, Itron reported that an unauthorized third party had accessed certain corporate systems, prompting activation of its cybersecurity response plan and engagement of external advisors. The company notified law enforcement, contained and removed the activity, and has since observed no further unauthorized access in its corporate or customer-hosted environments.

Itron stated that its contingency and backup measures allowed operations to continue in all material respects and that it expects a significant portion of related direct costs to be covered by insurance. The company is assessing required legal and regulatory notifications and, based on its ongoing review, does not currently believe the incident has had or is likely to have a material impact on its business.

data.title: Humacyte Regains Global Rights to Symvess Vascular Graft
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Humacyte ( (HUMA) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 21, 2026, Humacyte entered a third amendment to its distribution agreement with Fresenius Medical Care, regaining sole global rights to develop, commercialize and manage regulatory matters for its 6mm Symvess acellular tissue engineered vessel. In exchange for the reversion of ex-U.S. rights, Humacyte will pay Fresenius low-single-digit royalties on net sales outside the U.S. after a two-year royalty-free period in each country, while existing U.S. royalty terms, ranging from mid-single digits to low double digits, remain in place.

Humacyte announced the amended arrangement on April 24, 2026, emphasizing that the realignment of ex-U.S. rights strengthens its ability to pursue international expansion and indication-specific partnerships for Symvess, including previously announced commercial initiatives in Saudi Arabia and Israel. Fresenius, the company’s long-time partner and largest shareholder, remains obligated to adopt Symvess as a standard of care in eligible hemodialysis patients where supported by clinical and health economic data, preserving a key commercial channel as Humacyte seeks to scale its bioengineered vascular products globally.

The most recent analyst rating on (HUMA) stock is a Buy with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Humacyte stock, see the HUMA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HUMA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HUMA is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance (minimal/declining revenue, large losses, heavy cash burn, and high leverage). Technicals also indicate a downtrend with bearish momentum, despite oversold conditions. Offsetting these, the earnings call conveyed improving early commercial traction for Symvess, positive clinical data, and extended runway from recent financing, but these positives are not yet large enough to outweigh the current financial and trend risks.

To see Spark’s full report on HUMA stock, click here.

More about Humacyte

Humacyte, Inc. is a commercial-stage biotechnology platform company that develops universally implantable, bioengineered human tissues designed to treat a wide range of diseases, injuries and chronic conditions. Its lead products are acellular tissue engineered vessels (ATEVs), including Symvess, which received U.S. FDA approval in December 2024 for extremity vascular trauma and is in late-stage trials for hemodialysis arteriovenous access and peripheral artery disease.

The company is also advancing preclinical programs in coronary artery bypass grafts, pediatric heart surgery, type 1 diabetes and other novel cell and tissue applications. Several of Humacyte’s 6mm ATEVs hold FDA Regenerative Medicine Advanced Therapy and Fast Track designations, and the vascular trauma indication has priority designation from the U.S. Secretary of Defense, underscoring the platform’s strategic and clinical significance.

Average Trading Volume: 6,742,993

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $157.2M
